section_miscategorizations.text: He has not taken any pain medications but tried Tylenol for a few days without relief.

section_miscategorizations.text: The last x-ray did not reveal any broken bones or fractures.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient presents with acute left shoulder pain, likely musculoskeletal in origin.

section_miscategorizations.text: I suggest continuing with 600 mg of ibuprofen three times daily for one week.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is correctly placed as a treatment plan/medication order.

section_miscategorizations.text: Order medications and procedures as discussed.
